title: Supporting survivors through financial assistance
summary: By Representative Kerans of Danvers, a petition of Sally P. Kerans, Jason M. Lewis and Samantha Montaño that the Department of Public Health be authorized to establish a program to support survivors through financial assistance. Public Health.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Public Health
Hearing scheduled for 06/25/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in A-1
Reporting date extended to Tuesday, October 21, 2025
Reporting date extended to Thursday, November 20, 2025
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Ways and Means
